saved_prompts.1: Create a natural close-up video where the subject blinks softly, keeps a neutral expression, and maintains steady eye contact. Keep the camera fixed and the background stable.
saved_prompts.2: Animate a slow head turn from center to left, then to right, then back to center. Keep shoulders and torso still, preserve natural breathing, and avoid abrupt motion.
saved_prompts.3: Generate one smooth motion cycle: center to 40 degrees left, return to center, then 40 degrees right, and return to center. Keep expression neutral and lighting consistent.
saved_prompts.4: Create a realistic smartphone-style clip with subtle handheld drift, natural skin texture, and gentle micro-expressions. Keep movement minimal and believable.
saved_prompts.5: Start centered, turn gently left, transition through center to right, then return to center. Maintain continuous motion, natural pacing, and a calm facial expression.
saved_prompts.6: Make a clean portrait animation with slight breathing motion and a small side-to-side head movement before returning to center. Keep camera position fixed and output stable.
